items.title: Follow up with Gio on 7 diligence questions from Stephanie
items.context: Email from stephanie@fin.capital on Apr 28: Sent 7 detailed DD questions after data room review (AI commoditization, migration, ICP expansion, GTM, TAM, pricing, comp breakdown vs Almanax/Olympix). Gio replied Apr 29: 'Will follow up on this.'

items.context: Fan connected Ashwin (Sentra) with Kelly/Abir at Synchrony on Apr 29 and Brian at NextEra Energy on Apr 28. Both intros pending coordination of meetings.

items.title: Track responses from BD intro outreach for Opti
items.context: Rina introduced Opti to Donna and Rani on May 1. Jake introduced Opti to Parthiv on May 1. Both outreach emails sent with cyber identity positioning and Opti deck attached.

items.title: Review Prism Layer materials and newsletter post-meeting
items.context: Jake replied 'review?' after Apr 27 meeting with Simone (Prism Layer). Simone shared their newsletter with product/market content. Initial meeting held Apr 27.

items.title: Follow through on BD help commitment to Entro post-pass
items.context: Fan passed on investment Apr 29 but committed to staying helpful on BD. Earlier thread (Apr 16) identified pipeline overlap with Morgan Stanley, Edward Jones, Cox Automotive, PNC, and Fidelity for potential network leverage.
